1.0.0.description: Type-aware interpolation library returning lerp closures for all common Roblox data types. Color3 uses perceptual CIELUV blending; strings support progressive reveal or clock-format HH:MM:SS wrapping. Covers CFrame, UDim/UDim2, Vector2/3, NumberSequence, ColorSequence, PhysicalProperties, Ray, Rect, and Region3.
